examples: A couple of these magnificent birds swoop above us during a zodiac tour of the fjord.
All this may sound like a small squall in a narrow fjord.
Near her in the quiet fjord lay the crack 10, 000-ton cruiser Prinz Eugen.
Returning to shore, I saw a pod of beluga whales travelling across the fjord.
Just outside of town, hiking opportunities abound in the lush green hills that tower over the fjord.
